text: TOUCHPOINTS & EXPERIENCE What are the key touchpoints of the users with your platform (online & offline)? Are there IoT devices or other hardware interfaces / connections? PARTNERS PLATFORM ENVIRONMENT CANVAS v2.0 Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com TITLE DATE CREATED BYENVIRONMENTPLATFORM BUSINESS MODEL v5.0 Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com Created by fastbreak.one TITLEBUSINESS MODEL ENG VALUE CAPTURE CORE SERVICES What are the core services the platform offers? Which services are key differentiators to the competition? Which services help the users to § Get onboarded § For Matchmaking § To exchange / transfer goods / services / money § To stay engaged with your platform ECOSYSTEM IMPACT What is the platform contributing to the ecosystem in regards to Sustainability or Society aspects? COST STRUCTURE VALUE PROPOSITION MISSION What is the core mission of the ecosystem -> This expresses the WHY. KEY PEOPLE & SKILLS What are key people resources & skills required for running & emerging the ecosystem / platform? KEY DATA What data is required to optimize user experience and enhance value proposition? What data needs to be protected? Which insights help you to differentiate? KEY INFRASTRUCTURE What are key infrastructure elements you have to put in place to make the ecosystem work. SUPPORTERS Who are your core supporters & enablers providing e.g. key infrastructure elements. INVESTORS Who are core and strategic investors? Interested in the longterm success of the ecosystem, regulation and governance. Segments Needs SUPPLIERS Who are your key suppliers for e.g. to develop your platform IT? Monetization Strategies TAM USP What is your Unique Selling Proposition compared to alternative solutions? PIK CONSUMERS PRODUCERS CORE NETWORK EFFECTS Segments Needs Segments Needs CORE VALUE PROPOSITIONS What is the core value transferred or exchanged inside the ecosystem? SAMSOM User Acquisition Sales / MarketingInfrastructureOthers What are key activities & investments, responsible for 80% of the costs? The entire potential market independently from your ability to reach and serve it The users you can actual serve and reach with your business The share and portion of the market that you can capture
